sentence: Never loreain your uquish. They either see it or they don't.

wombos.definition: The quality of being simultaneously unique, quirky, and niche — so distinctly one-of-a-kind and offbeat that it occupies its own untouchable corner of culture.
wombos.example: Her whole aesthetic is completely uquish — there's no one else doing what she does.

wombos.definition: To over-explain the backstory, mythology, or concept behind something. Used as a verb: 'let me loreain this,' 'stop loreaining me,' 'she loreained the whole thing.'
